name: rust-rf
description: A Rust port of scikit-rf for RF and microwave engineering. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

files.path: doc/source/examples/metrology/Measuring a Mutiport Device with a 2-Port Network Analyzer.ipynb
doc/source/examples/networks/Compute Error Between S Parameter Matrices.ipynb
doc/source/examples/networksets/Export Network Set as MDIF File.ipynb
doc/source/examples/networktheory/Time domain reflectometry, measurement vs simulation.ipynb
